file_insights.changes: Added NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS constant (14 patterns) and is_network_error() helper function with case-insensitive matching
file_insights.significance: Core network error detection mechanism for adapter-level resilience
file_insights.test_coverage: 4 new tests added (tests 6-9): connection refused detection, DNS failure detection, false-negative handling, case-insensitivity

file_insights.changes: Progress tracker for spec 024 with 9 completed task summaries across 3 phases
file_insights.significance: Documentation of feature implementation progress and status

file_insights.changes: Comprehensive implementation plan with 5 phases, 10 subtasks, dependencies, and verification strategies
file_insights.significance: Technical blueprint for entire sleep/wake/network resilience feature (Phase 1-5)

patterns_discovered.description: Centralized constant list of 14 network failure patterns (connection refused, network unreachable, DNS failures, socket/TLS errors)
patterns_discovered.application: Case-insensitive pattern matching in adapter stderr to detect transient failures
patterns_discovered.reusability: Used by both claude.nu and codex.nu adapters; can be extended to other adapters

patterns_discovered.description: is_network_error() uses Nushell pipeline: iterate patterns → `str contains --ignore-case` → `| any` aggregation
patterns_discovered.application: Nushell idiomatic approach for multi-pattern matching against unstructured text
patterns_discovered.language_fit: Leverages Nushell's dataflow paradigm vs imperative loops

patterns_discovered.description: Phase 1 (power.rs) independent; Phase 2 (adapters) independent; Phase 3+ depend on Phase 2
patterns_discovered.application: Allows parallel work on power watcher (Rust) and network detection (Nushell) simultaneously

patterns_discovered.description: Tests include both positive detection (connection refused) and negative cases (non-error messages)
patterns_discovered.application: Ensures high specificity to avoid false positives in normal adapter output

gotchas_discovered.issue: Different error message formats (NETWORK UNREACHABLE vs network unreachable) require case-insensitive matching
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: is_network_error() uses --ignore-case flag in str contains

gotchas_discovered.issue: 429 Too Many check in OTel responses can collide with transient failure detection
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Subtask-2-2 notes: 'Ensure existing 429 Too Many check remains to avoid OTel timestamp false positives'

gotchas_discovered.issue: Implementation plan specifies max 3 retries per card episode to prevent infinite retry loops
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Dispatcher logic will enforce retry_count < 3 check before moving to pending/

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: TCP Probe Timeout Must Be Explicit
gotchas_discovered.issue: Connectivity probe in Phase 4 requires 2s timeout to prevent blocking on slow networks
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Subtask-4-1 specifies timeout in provider_reachable() implementation

gotchas_discovered.issue: IOKit on macOS requires 8s response deadline for IOAllowPowerChange, Linux uses D-Bus
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Dedicated OS thread pattern in power.rs with platform-specific stubs

approach_outcome.description: Add NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS constant and is_network_error helper to claude.nu
what_was_done: Added NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS with 14 error patterns covering connection, DNS, and SSL/TLS failures
Implemented is_network_error() function with case-insensitive pattern matching
Added 4 comprehensive tests (tests 6-9) covering positive, negative, and edge cases
All code follows existing patterns in claude.nu (const definition, helper structure, test framework)
Code verified via manual review (nu command unavailable in test environment)

commits.message: auto-claude: subtask-2-1 - Add NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS constant and is_network_error helper to claude.nu
auto-claude: Update progress for subtask-2-1 completion

test_names: Test 8: Returns false for non-error messages (negative test)

recommendations.action: Proceed with subtask-2-2 (codex.nu network detection) immediately
recommendations.rationale: Phase 2 is parallelizable with Phase 1; subtask-2-1 provides reference implementation
recommendations.note: Remember to preserve existing '429 Too Many' check to avoid OTel false positives

recommendations.action: Consider extracting NETWORK_ERROR_PATTERNS to shared constant module
recommendations.rationale: Pattern list used in multiple adapters (claude.nu, codex.nu) and dispatcher (Phase 3); single source of truth reduces maintenance burden
recommendations.alternative: Define in dispatch.nu shared functions or .env template

recommendations.action: Plan integration tests for Phase 3 retry workflow once network detection is in all adapters
recommendations.rationale: Unit tests cover pattern matching; integration tests should verify: card moves to pending/, 30s cooldown applied, retry_count incremented, caps at 3
recommendations.test_scenario: Mock adapter that exits code 75 on first two runs, succeeds on third

recommendations.action: Ensure retry attempts are logged clearly with distinct prefixes
recommendations.rationale: Spec plan mentions '[warn] transient failure on <id>, retrying in 30s' log format; critical for debugging retry loop issues

recommendations.action: Backfill network error patterns to other adapters (ollama.nu, opencode.nu, aider.nu) after Phase 2 completes
recommendations.rationale: Network resilience is cross-cutting concern; full adapter coverage improves overall system robustness

recommendations.action: Document the 3-retry cap and 30s cooldown in implementation comments and CONTRIBUTING guide
recommendations.rationale: Prevents future confusion about why cards stop retrying after 3 attempts
